summary: Frontend-only landing page tested via Playwright at desktop (1440x900) and mobile (375x812). All 13 review requirements validated. Header/Hero/Areas marquee/Featured listings/Services/Hot Areas Grid/FAQ accordion/Footer/WhatsApp float/Mobile menu all working. Every WhatsApp deep link resolves to https://wa.me/6282341854239 with the correct prefilled inquiry text. No console errors. Sticky header gains backdrop-blur-xl + border on scroll. FAQ item expands on click (data-state='open' verified). Mobile hamburger reveals all 5 nav items and the mobile-whatsapp-cta. Marquee renders all 15 hot areas. All 5 listing cards, 5 service cards, and 8 area cards have correct hrefs.
critical_code_review_comments:
Hero headline (Hero.jsx:30) and About headline (About.jsx:52) split text across multiple JSX lines — works fine visually but breaks exact text= selectors in tests. Consider keeping the full phrase on one logical line (use
or whitespace) for easier automated testing. Non-blocking.
data.js HOT_AREAS has 15 entries but AREAS array only has 8 cards for the HotAreasGrid — confirmed intentional per spec (marquee=15, grid=8). No action needed.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth on this marketing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure marketing landing page (no backend). Validate hrefs (not navigation) since WhatsApp links open in new tab. Marquee duplicates the 15 areas (30 DOM children) for seamless loop — assert via inner_text contains, not unique count. Hero & About headlines are split into 2 JSX lines so use partial text matches.
